activities.name: Show Up
activities.description: Attend any session — the base earn, no conditions attached.

activities.name: Plan Ahead
activities.description: Book a session 48 or more hours in advance to reward commitment over impulse.

activities.name: Off-Peak Pioneer
activities.description: Attend a session during designated quiet hours between 10am and 4pm on weekdays.

activities.name: PR Unlocked
activities.description: Log a personal record on a coached lift, verified by a Slam coach on the floor.

activities.name: Block Complete
activities.description: Finish a full programme cycle such as an 8-week strength block from start to finish.

activities.name: Coach Connect
activities.description: Complete a scheduled goal review or check-in session with your assigned coach.

activities.name: Slam Form Post
activities.description: Tag @SlamFitness in a progress post on social media, verified via linked account once per week.

activities.name: Bring Your Crew
activities.description: Earn Reps when a friend completes their first session using your personal Crew referral code.

activities.name: Boot Camp Regular
activities.description: Attend a group boot camp session, earning additional Reps on top of your standard Show Up earn.

activities.name: 7-Day Streak
activities.description: Attend at least one session across seven consecutive days, with rest days counted as permitted.

activities.name: 30-Day Streak
activities.description: Maintain consistent weekly attendance across thirty consecutive days without missing a week.

activities.name: Challenge Accepted
activities.description: Enrol in a studio challenge event such as a seasonal competition or an 8-week block.

activities.name: Solid Week
activities.description: Complete four or more training sessions within a single calendar week.

activities.name: Early Bird
activities.description: Attend any session that starts at or before 7am for a stackable daily bonus on top of regular earns.

rewards.name: Protein Bar Bundle
rewards.description: Receive a week's supply of Slam-stocked nutrition products as a low-bar, high-frequency treat.

rewards.name: Guest Pass
rewards.description: Bring a friend for one free session — socially framed as an invite, never as a discount.

rewards.name: Recovery Session
rewards.description: Enjoy a 45-minute foam rolling and mobility session with a coach in a premium quiet-hours slot.

rewards.name: Slam Kit Credit
rewards.description: Redeem €10 credit toward Slam-branded apparel or accessories from the studio store.

rewards.name: Programme Upgrade
rewards.description: Unlock a bespoke 4-week advanced programme block designed personally by a senior Slam coach.

rewards.name: Performance Test Session
rewards.description: Complete a one-on-one coach-led session covering 1RM assessment, movement screen, or performance benchmarking.

rewards.name: Wall of Form Feature
rewards.description: Have your name and a PR milestone posted to Slam's physical Wall of Form in the studio and on social channels.

rewards.name: Month Free
rewards.description: Receive one full month of membership credited to your account — the aspirational anchor reward every member trains toward.
